title:
Ye video AI se bana hai 🤖🔥 📈 
Future technology ka cinematic glimpse 😮‍🔥 

Socho jab AI imagination ko reality bana de…
Har scene, har motion, har detail — sab AI power 💡 

Aaj AI sirf tool nahi, creativity ka future hai 🚀 
Agar tumhe bhi AI videos, future tech aur cinematic visuals pasand hain 
to ye reel end tak dekho 👀🔥 

Comment karo: “AI 🔥” 
Aur follow karo — roz aise hi AI videos ke liye 💯

prompt_text: A surreal scene set in a dusty, rural area featuring a small, pink-painted shop. A man wearing a white shirt and khaki pants stands before a cracked concrete floor. As he lifts a massive slab, the entire pink building rises with it, revealing it to be part of the foundation. The lighting is bright daylight, and the background shows trucks and posters on the walls.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A surreal scene set in a dusty, rural area featuring a small, pink-painted shop. A man wearing a white shirt and khaki pants stands before a cracked concrete floor. As he lifts a massive slab, the entire pink building rises with it, revealing it to be part of the foundation. The lighting is bright daylight, and the background shows trucks and posters on the walls.

cinematography.cameraShot: Low-angle wide shot that follows the man's upward movement. The camera pans up as the building is lifted.

actions: Man stands over a deep crack in the concrete.
He bends down and grips the edge of the slab.
He lifts the entire slab, along with the pink shop, above his head.
The man walks forward while carrying the building, as dust falls from the broken foundation.
dialogue: [Upbeat rhythmic music with vocals in a non-English language]
[Sound of crumbling stone and debris hitting the ground]
